prompt:
Goal: Create an elegant editorial-style 3D infographic about 2020–2026 China divorce population, using Chinese typography and a minimalist museum-display aesthetic.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 composition on warm off-white textured paper, soft studio lighting, subtle shadows, muted cream background.

Layout: Place a large black Chinese headline on the upper left reading “2020–2026\n中国离婚人数”. Beneath it, add a smaller subtitle “全国依法办理离婚手续” with a thin horizontal line ending in a small orange dot. The main visual is a dark charcoal oval/cylindrical podium spanning the lower middle, with a recessed oval opening at the top like a stage. Along the podium front, label the years from left to right: 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025, 2026.

Chart elements: Use exactly 7 vertical year positions. Show 5 solid rectangular 3D bars and 2 dashed-outline placeholder bars. The 5 solid bars are: 2020 tall ochre-gold bar labeled “433.9”; 2021 shorter dusty coral bar labeled “283.9” with a small callout tag “2021 低点”; 2022 muted sage-green bar labeled “287.9”; 2023 taller salmon-pink bar labeled “360.53” with a small callout tag “2023 回升”; 2024 beige stone bar labeled “351.3”. The 2 future placeholders are dashed transparent bars for 2025 and 2026, each with a hanging tag below reading “待更新”. Put small black dots and leader lines above each numeric value.

Decorative details: Add two tiny human figures for scale: one standing on the left edge of the podium near a simple railing and sparse delicate branch/tree, another standing on the right side near the future bars. Add a large flat golden sun circle in the upper right. Add a tall cream rectangular slab on the far right behind the podium with a thin black vertical line in front. At the lower left, place a wooden semicircle, a leaning paper sheet with a small orange circle, a small pale green cube, and a miniature beige line-chart card attached to the podium front.

Text and legend: In the bottom-left corner add an orange dot followed by “单位：万对”. Keep all visible text in Chinese as specified, with crisp black type and no extra labels.

Visual style: Refined data-visualization poster, tactile paper texture, 3D clay/paper-cut look, muted ochre coral sage beige palette, high-end magazine infographic, clean negative space, realistic soft shadows, precise alignment.

Constraints: Use exactly the 7 year positions and exactly the 5 solid bars plus 2 dashed future bars described above. Do not add watermarks, logos, extra charts, or additional people.
